properties.displayName: Fortra Agari Data Connector (via Codeless Connector Framework)

connectorUiConfig.title: Fortra Agari Data Connector (via Codeless Connector Framework)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The [Fortra Agari Data Connector](https://www.agari.com/) allows ingesting logs from Fortra Agari APIs into Microsoft Sentinel. This connector integrates with Agari Brand Protection (BP), Phishing Defense (APD), and Phishing Response (APR) products. It supports DCR-based ingestion time transformations for efficient query execution. Refer to [Agari API documentation](https://developers.agari.com/agari-platform/reference/overview) for more information.

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

instructionSteps.title: Configuration steps for the Agari API
instructionSteps.description: Follow the instructions below to obtain your Agari API credentials.

parameters.content:
#### 1. Retrieve API URL
Log in to your Agari Console and navigate to the API section. The default API URL is https://api.agari.com

#### 2. Retrieve Client Credentials
Obtain your Client ID and Client Secret from the API credentials section in your Agari account. Note that different Agari products (Brand Protection, Phishing Defense, Phishing Response) may require separate API credentials.

#### 3. Select Data Streams
Choose which Agari data streams you want to collect. You can select one or more streams based on your subscription and requirements.

options.text: Brand Protection Threat Feed URL Submissions (IoC)

dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend TimeGenerated = now() , Id = ['id'] , AlertType = ['alert_type'] , LastNotifiedAt = ['last_notified_at'] , ResolvedAt = ['resolved_at'] , CreatedAt = ['created_at'] , UpdatedAt = ['updated_at'] , Summary = ['summary'] , Domain = ['domain'] , SpfFailHosts = ['spf_fail_hosts'] , DkimFailHosts = ['dkim_fail_hosts'] , Links = ['links'] | project TimeGenerated , Id , AlertType , LastNotifiedAt , ResolvedAt , CreatedAt , UpdatedAt , Summary , Domain , SpfFailHosts , DkimFailHosts , Links

source | extend TimeGenerated = now() , Id = ['id'] , AlertDefinitionName = ['alert_definition_name'] , CreatedAt = ['created_at'] , UpdatedAt = ['updated_at'] , Summary = ['summary'] , PolicyAction = ['policy_action'] , PolicyEnabled = ['policy_enabled'] , NotifiedOriginalRecipients = ['notified_original_recipients'] , AdminRecipients = ['admin_recipients'] | project TimeGenerated , Id , AlertDefinitionName , CreatedAt , UpdatedAt , Summary , PolicyAction , PolicyEnabled , NotifiedOriginalRecipients , AdminRecipients

source | extend TimeGenerated = now() , Id = ['id'] , To = ['to'] , From = ['from'] , FromDomain = ['from_domain'] , AttackTypes = ['attack_types'] , TimestampMs = ['timestamp_ms'] , MessageDate = ['date'] , Subject = ['subject'] , Ip = ['ip'] , Sbrs = ['sbrs'] , DomainReputation = ['domain_reputation'] , PolicyIds = ['policy_ids'] , DomainTags = ['domain_tags'] , HasAttachment = ['has_attachment'] , MessageDetailsLink = ['message_details_link'] , AttachmentSha256 = ['attachment_sha256'] , AttachmentExtensions = ['attachment_extensions'] , AttachmentFilenames = ['attachment_filenames'] | project TimeGenerated , Id , To , From , FromDomain , AttackTypes , TimestampMs , MessageDate , Subject , Ip , Sbrs , DomainReputation , PolicyIds , DomainTags , HasAttachment , MessageDetailsLink , AttachmentSha256 , AttachmentExtensions , AttachmentFilenames
source | extend TimeGenerated = now() , Id = ['id'] , Uri = ['uri'] , CreatedAt = ['created_at'] , ThreatFeedId = ['threat_feed_id'] | project TimeGenerated , Id , Uri , CreatedAt , ThreatFeedId

source | extend TimeGenerated = now() , Id = ['id'] , Filename = ['filename'] , ContentType = ['content_type'] , Size = ['size'] , Sha256 = ['sha256'] , CreatedAt = ['created_at'] , AttachmentType = ['type'] , Url = ['url'] | project TimeGenerated , Id , Filename , ContentType , Size , Sha256 , CreatedAt , AttachmentType , Url

columns.name: Id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the investigation attachment

columns.name: Filename
columns.description: Original filename of the attachment

columns.name: ContentType
columns.description: MIME content type of the attachment (e.g. application/pdf, message/rfc822)

columns.name: Size
columns.description: File size of the attachment in bytes

columns.name: Sha256
columns.description: SHA-256 hash of the attachment for threat intelligence correlation

columns.name: CreatedAt
columns.description: Timestamp when the attachment was added to the investigation

columns.name: AttachmentType
columns.description: Category of attachment (e.g. screenshot, email_source, pcap)

columns.name: Url
columns.description: URL to download the attachment from the Agari console

columns.name: Id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the policy event

columns.name: AlertDefinitionName
columns.description: Name of the alert definition associated with the policy event

columns.name: CreatedAt
columns.description: Timestamp when the policy event was created

columns.name: UpdatedAt
columns.description: Timestamp when the policy event was last updated

columns.name: Summary
columns.description: Policy Event Summary flag

columns.name: PolicyAction
columns.description: Action taken by the policy (deliver, mark-spam, move, inbox, delete, none)

columns.name: PolicyEnabled
columns.description: Whether the policy that triggered this event is enabled

columns.name: NotifiedOriginalRecipients
columns.description: Whether the original email recipients were notified about this policy event

columns.name: AdminRecipients
columns.description: Array of admin email addresses notified about this policy event

schema.name: AgariAPDTCLog_CL
schema.description: Agari Phishing Defense threat category messages

columns.name: Id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the message (UUID)

columns.name: To
columns.description: Recipient email address

columns.name: From
columns.description: Sender email address

columns.name: FromDomain
columns.description: Domain of the sender email address

columns.name: AttackTypes
columns.description: Array of detected attack types (e.g. phishing, credential_theft)

columns.name: TimestampMs
columns.description: Timestamp in milliseconds when the message was processed

columns.name: MessageDate
columns.description: Date and time the message was received

columns.name: Subject
columns.description: Email subject line

columns.name: Ip
columns.description: IP address of the sending mail server

columns.name: Sbrs
columns.description: SenderBase Reputation Score of the sending IP

columns.name: DomainReputation
columns.description: Reputation score of the sending domain

columns.name: PolicyIds
columns.description: Array of policy IDs that matched this message

columns.name: DomainTags
columns.description: Array of tags applied to the sending domain

columns.name: HasAttachment
columns.description: Whether the message has attachments

columns.name: MessageDetailsLink
columns.description: URL to view the message details in the Agari console

columns.name: AttachmentSha256
columns.description: Array of SHA-256 hashes of message attachments

columns.name: AttachmentExtensions
columns.description: Array of file extensions of message attachments

columns.name: AttachmentFilenames
columns.description: Array of filenames of message attachments

columns.name: Id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the alert

columns.name: AlertType
columns.description: Type of alert (e.g., authentication_spike, phishing)

columns.name: LastNotifiedAt
columns.description: Timestamp when the alert was last notified

columns.name: ResolvedAt
columns.description: Timestamp when the alert was resolved

columns.name: CreatedAt
columns.description: Timestamp when the alert was created

columns.name: UpdatedAt
columns.description: Timestamp when the alert was last updated

columns.name: Summary
columns.description: Human-readable summary of the alert

columns.name: Domain
columns.description: Domain associated with the alert

columns.name: SpfFailHosts
columns.description: Array of hosts with SPF authentication failures

columns.name: DkimFailHosts
columns.description: Array of hosts with DKIM authentication failures

columns.name: Links
columns.description: Related API links for failure stats and samples

schema.name: AgariBPThreatFeedSubs_CL
schema.description: Agari Brand Protection threat feed URL submissions (IoC)

columns.name: Id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the threat feed submission

columns.name: Uri
columns.description: URL IoC extracted from the threat feed submission

columns.name: CreatedAt
columns.description: Timestamp when the submission was created

columns.name: ThreatFeedId
columns.description: Identifier of the parent threat feed

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

Agari Phishing Defense and Brand Protection Solution for Microsoft Sentinel makes it easy to connect Agari email threat data to the Microsoft Sentinel SOAR, improving visibility into email threats, accelerating incident response, and driving SOC efficiency. The Agari Data Connector included in the solution supports every Agari product: Agari Brand Protection, Agari Phishing Defense, and Agari Phishing Response. Leveraging Agari data to enrich and share threat intelligence across multiple applications helps safeguard your entire infrastructure against email threats. For more details about this solution refer to https://www.agari.com/insights/solution-briefs/microsoft-azure-sentinel-integration/

Underlying Microsoft Technologies used:

This solution takes a dependency on the following technologies, and some of these dependencies either may be in Preview state or might result in additional ingestion or operational costs:

  1. Codeless Connector Framework (CCF)

  2. Log Ingestion API

  3. Data Collection Rules (DCR)

Data Connectors: 1

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions
